name: CustomNodeManager
summary: Manages instantiation of custom nodes. All custom nodes known to Dynamo should be stored with this type. This object implements late initialization of custom nodes by providing a single interface to initialize custom nodes.

constructors.name: CustomNodeManager(Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory, Dynamo.Migration.MigrationManager, Dynamo.Engine.LibraryServices)
constructors.signature: void CustomNodeManager(Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeLoaders.NodeFactory nodeFactory, Dynamo.Migration.MigrationManager migrationManager, Dynamo.Engine.LibraryServices libraryServices)

params.name: nodeFactory
params.doc: NodeFactory

params.name: migrationManager
params.doc: MigrationManager

params.name: libraryServices
params.doc: LibraryServices

methods.name: AddUninitializedCustomNode(string, bool, ref Dynamo.CustomNodeInfo)
methods.signature: bool AddUninitializedCustomNode(string file, bool isTestMode, ref Dynamo.CustomNodeInfo info)
methods.summary: Import a dyf file for eventual initialization.

params.name: file
params.doc: Path to a custom node file on disk.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Flag specifying whether or not this should operate in "test mode".

params.name: info
params.doc: If the info was successfully processed, this parameter will be set to it. Otherwise, it will be set to null.

returns.doc: True on success, false if the file could not be read properly.

methods.name: AddUninitializedCustomNodesInPath(string, bool, Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.PackageInfo)
methods.signature: System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.CustomNodeInfo> AddUninitializedCustomNodesInPath(string path, bool isTestMode, Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.PackageInfo packageInfo)
methods.summary: Scans the given path for custom node files, retaining their information in the manager for later potential initialization. Should be used when packages load or reload customNodes.

params.name: path
params.doc: Path on disk to scan for custom nodes.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Flag specifying whether or not this should operate in "test mode".

params.name: packageInfo
params.doc: Info about the package that requested this customNode to be loaded or to which the customNode belongs. Is PackageMember property will be true if this property is not null.

methods.name: AddUninitializedCustomNodesInPath(string, bool, bool)
methods.signature: System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.CustomNodeInfo> AddUninitializedCustomNodesInPath(string path, bool isTestMode, bool isPackageMember)
methods.summary: Scans the given path for custom node files, retaining their information in the manager for later potential initialization.

params.name: path
params.doc: Path on disk to scan for custom nodes.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Flag specifying whether this should operate in "test mode".

params.name: isPackageMember
params.doc: Indicates whether custom node comes from package or not.

methods.name: Contains(System.Guid)
methods.summary: Returns true if the custom node's unique identifier is inside of the manager (initialized or not)

params.name: guid
params.doc: The FunctionId

methods.name: Contains(string)
methods.summary: Returns true if the custom node's name is inside the manager (initialized or not)

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the custom node.

methods.name: CreateCustomNodeInstance(System.Guid, string, bool)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.CustomNodes.Function CreateCustomNodeInstance(System.Guid id, string name, bool isTestMode)
methods.summary: Creates a new Custom Node Instance.

params.name: id
params.doc: Identifier referring to a custom node definition.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name for the custom node to be instantiated, used for error recovery if the given id could not be found.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Flag specifying whether or not this should operate in "test mode".

methods.name: CreateCustomNodeInstance(System.Guid, string, bool, Dynamo.CustomNodeDefinition, Dynamo.CustomNodeInfo)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.CustomNodes.Function CreateCustomNodeInstance(System.Guid id, string name, bool isTestMode, Dynamo.CustomNodeDefinition def, Dynamo.CustomNodeInfo info)
methods.summary: Creates a new Custom Node Instance.

params.name: id
params.doc: Identifier referring to a custom node definition.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name for the custom node to be instantiated, used for error recovery if the given id could not be found.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Flag specifying whether or not this should operate in "test mode".

params.name: def
params.doc: Custom node definition data

params.name: info
params.doc: Custom node information data

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: Call this method to uninitialize all loaded custom node functions.

methods.name: GetWorkspaceById(System.Guid)
methods.summary: Returns custom node workspace by a specified custom node ID

params.name: customNodeId
params.doc: Custom node ID of a requested workspace

returns.doc: Custom node workspace by a specified ID

methods.name: GuidFromPath(string)
methods.summary: Returns a function id from a guid assuming that the file is already loaded.

methods.name: OpenCustomNodeWorkspace(System.Xml.XmlDocument, Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceInfo, bool, ref Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceModel)
methods.signature: bool OpenCustomNodeWorkspace(System.Xml.XmlDocument xmlDoc, Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceInfo workspaceInfo, bool isTestMode, ref Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceModel workspace)
methods.summary: Opens a Custom Node workspace from an XmlDocument, given a pre-constructed WorkspaceInfo.

params.name: xmlDoc
params.doc: Xml content of workspace

params.name: workspaceInfo
params.doc: Workspace header describing the custom node file.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Flag specifying whether or not this should operate in "test mode".

returns.doc: Boolean indicating if Custom Node Workspace opened.

methods.name: Remove(System.Guid)
methods.summary: Attempts to remove all traces of a particular custom node from Dynamo, assuming the node is not in a loaded workspace.

params.name: guid
params.doc: Custom node identifier.

methods.name: TryGetCustomNodeData(System.Guid, string, bool, ref Dynamo.CustomNodeDefinition, ref Dynamo.CustomNodeInfo)
methods.signature: bool TryGetCustomNodeData(System.Guid id, string name, bool isTestMode, ref Dynamo.CustomNodeDefinition def, ref Dynamo.CustomNodeInfo info)
methods.summary: Attempts to get custom node info and definition data.

params.name: id
params.doc: Identifier referring to a custom node definition.

params.name: name
params.doc: Name for the custom node to be instantiated, used for error recovery if the given id could not be found.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Flag specifying whether this should operate in "test mode".

params.name: def
params.doc: Custom node definition data

params.name: info
params.doc: Custom node information data

methods.name: TryGetFunctionDefinition(System.Guid, bool, ref Dynamo.CustomNodeDefinition)
methods.signature: bool TryGetFunctionDefinition(System.Guid id, bool isTestMode, ref Dynamo.CustomNodeDefinition definition)
methods.summary: Returns the function definition from a guid.

params.name: id
params.doc: Custom node identifier.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Flag specifying whether or not this should operate in "test mode".

returns.doc: Boolean indicating if Custom Node Workspace defination is loaded.

methods.name: TryGetFunctionWorkspace(System.Guid, bool, ref Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.CustomNodeWorkspaceModel)
methods.signature: bool TryGetFunctionWorkspace(System.Guid id, bool isTestMode, ref Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.CustomNodeWorkspaceModel ws)
methods.summary: Returns the function workspace from a guid

params.name: id
params.doc: The unique id for the node.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: Flag specifying whether or not this should operate in "test mode".

returns.doc: The path to the node or null if it wasn't found.

methods.name: TryGetFunctionWorkspace(System.Guid, bool, ref Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.ICustomNodeWorkspaceModel)
methods.signature: bool TryGetFunctionWorkspace(System.Guid id, bool isTestMode, ref Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.ICustomNodeWorkspaceModel ws)

params.name: id
params.doc: The identifier.

params.name: isTestMode
params.doc: if set to true [is test mode].

params.name: ws
params.doc: The workspace.

returns.doc: Boolean indicating if Custom Node Workspace defination is loaded.

properties.name: LoadedDefinitions
properties.summary: CustomNodeDefinitions for all loaded custom nodes, in load order.

events.name: CustomNodeRemoved
events.summary: An event that is fired when a custom node is removed from Dynamo.

events.name: DefinitionUpdated
events.summary: An event that is fired when a definition is updated

events.name: InfoUpdated
events.summary: An event that is fired when new or updated info is available for a custom node.
